scene.name: The Pallid Hart — Common Room
scene.description: A cramped common room lit by a dying fire. Snow hammers the shuttered windows. The wind screams. A bar runs along the back wall where a nervous woman polishes the same glass over and over. A hooded figure sits motionless in the far corner. The door to the cellar is closed, a cloth draped over its handle. This is The Pallid Hart — the last shelter on a road that leads nowhere good.

marta.name: Marta Kowalski
knowledge: Her husband Piotr disappeared three weeks ago
Two other travelers vanished from the inn recently
Scratching sounds from the cellar at night
A dead animal drained of blood found behind the inn
The hooded stranger arrived two days ago and barely speaks

hooded-stranger.name: The Stranger
knowledge: He is the vampire responsible for the disappearances
He has a coffin hidden in the cellar
He senses which players are most vulnerable
Dawn will force him to retreat
revealTriggers: Someone enters the cellar and finds his coffin
Holy symbol brandished with genuine faith
Dawn approaches and he becomes desperate

beats.name: Strangers arrive at the inn and take shelter from the blizzard
Characters introduce themselves to each other and to Marta
Players notice something off — the stranger, Marta's nervousness, odd details
First concrete evidence something is wrong (missing husband, bloodless animal, cellar sounds)
Players actively search for answers — questioning NPCs, exploring the inn
Something frightening happens — lights go out, someone screams, blood is found
Players discover definitive evidence of the vampire (coffin, feeding, supernatural event)
The vampire is confronted or reveals himself
Final battle or desperate survival until dawn
Dawn breaks. Survivors emerge. The party is forged in shared trauma.
